name: Shenzhen Chipscreen Biosciences Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Chipscreen Biosciences Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and sale of original small molecule drugs. The company develops precursor compounds and original new drug product lines that are in various research phase of the specific global intellectual property protection in three areas, such as cancer, metabolic diseases, and autoimmune diseases. Shenzhen Chipscreen Biosciences Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
